changes.before: "Same as the south-road villages," Jaina said. "Early enough to hide under fever if you want to be stupid about it. If I can get to the sick, I'll know whether it's started in the gut."
changes.after: "Same as the south-road villages," Jaina said. "Early enough to hide under fever if you want to be stupid about it. If I can get to the sick, I'll know where it's taking hold."
